hero.title: Online ticketing for your events
hero.subtitle: Sell your tickets, manage entry and analyze your sales.
hero.description: The all-in-one ticketing solution for event organizers. Create your event, sell your tickets and control access with professional tools. Set up in 5 minutes, no installation fees.

showcase.title: A ticketing page your attendees will love
showcase.description: A clean, mobile ready event page with secure checkout, promo codes and transparent fees. Your buyers see your event, pick their tickets and pay in seconds.

dashboard.title: Manage everything from one dashboard
dashboard.description: Create your events, set up ticket tiers, follow your sales and control access from a single organizer dashboard. No installation, no spreadsheets.

event-types.title: A ticketing solution for every type of event

features.title: Everything you need to sell and manage your tickets

flexible-tickets.title: Flexible ticket types
flexible-tickets.description: Create multiple ticket tiers, early bird pricing, group packages and VIP experiences.

qr-control.title: QR code access control
qr-control.description: Fast and secure entry management with QR code scanning and real-time validation.

analytics.title: Real-time analytics
analytics.description: Track sales, attendance and revenue with complete dashboards.

payments.title: Secure payments
payments.description: PCI-compliant payment processing with support for multiple payment methods.

mobile.title: Mobile optimized
mobile.description: Sell tickets anywhere with our mobile-first design and progressive web app.

refunds.title: Easy refunds
refunds.description: Handle cancellations and refunds with automated policies and instant processing.

steps.title: How to create your online ticketing

create.title: Create your event
create.description: Set up your event in a few minutes with all the details your attendees need.

configure.title: Configure your tickets
configure.description: Define your ticket types, prices, capacity and sales periods.

sell.title: Sell and manage
sell.description: Sell online, scan tickets at the door and track everything in real time.

fees.question: What are the ticketing fees?
fees.answer: Transparent pricing with no installation fees. You can include the fees in the displayed price or pass them on to attendees.

setup-time.question: How long does it take to create my event?
setup-time.answer: About 5 minutes. Create your event, configure your tickets and start selling right away.

payments.question: When will I receive my payments?
payments.answer: Fast and secure payouts with PCI-compliant processing and support for multiple payment methods.

features.question: Which features are included?
features.answer: Flexible ticket types, QR code access control, real-time analytics, secure payments, mobile optimization and easy refunds.

support.question: What kind of support do you offer?
support.answer: Dedicated support to help you set up and run your events.

final-cta.title: Ready to launch your ticketing?
final-cta.description: Create your event and start selling tickets online in just a few minutes.

hero.subtitle: Sell registrations, manage check in and track attendance.
